name: uptick
description: Reads Uptick field service management data (tasks, clients, properties, invoices, assets) through the Uptick REST API using OAuth2 password-grant auth.

risk.read: external Uptick field service management API read of tasks, clients, properties, invoices, and assets
risk.approval: none; read-only, no reverse-ETL write surface

conformance.reason: custom-auth-only (mode:custom AuthHook, no when-gated non-custom fallback); hook-covered, proven live by internal/connectors/paritytest/uptick (the AuthHook's real OAuth2 password-grant path) -- conformance's synthetic config has no real username/password round-trip and cannot exercise mode:custom auth at all, so every auth-resolving dynamic check would otherwise fail identically and uninformatively
